snippet.title: Tu Bhi Sataya Jayega (Official Video) Vishal Mishra | Aly Goni, Jasmin Bhasin | VYRL Originals
snippet.description:
VYRL Originals presents the multi award-winning singer-composer Vishal Mishra’s Tu Bhi Sataya Jayega featuring Bigg Boss fame and popular couple Aly Goni and Jasmin Bhasin. The song has been written by Vishal Mishra and Kaushal Kishore narrating this story from a female perspective. The Music Video has been directed by Navjit Buttar and has been shot in a grand scale. Watch Aly & Jasmin in a never before seen avatar, showcasing skilfully the pain and anguish of a toxic relationship. You are in for a surprise as the story unfolds to a shocking end. 

#VYRLOriginals #TuBhiSatayaJayega #AlyJasmin 

🎶 Listen 🎧  🎶 Now On 📲 🤳
🎧 JioSaavn - https://www.jiosaavn.com/album/tu-bhi-sataya-jayega/6aU5iFSLJ3c_

📝 Lyrics
 
Ye jo jagah jagah dard ki kahaniyaan sunata hai
Ye jo jagah jagah dard ki kahaniyaan sunata hai
Farebi hai ,sab jhooth batata hai
 
Toda jayega tu bhi toda jayega, 
meri tarah tu bhi chhoda jayega
Toda jayega tu bhi toda jayega, 
meri tarah tu bhi chhoda jayega
Kitno ke dil barbaad karega, 
aag lagayega
Tu sach mein kitna behaya hai, 
sach ye saamne aayega
Tune bada sataya hai mujhe ja, 
tu bhi sataya jayega
Haaye bada rulaya hai mujhe ja, 
tu bhi rulaya jayega
Tune bada sataya hai mujhe ja, 
tu bhi sataya jayega
 
Kitno ko seene se lagaya, meri tarha saath sulaya
Kitno ko seene se lagaya, meri tarha saath sulaya
Aankhon mein teri paani nahi hai, 
sabko tune kitna rulaya
Isse sharm na aayegi zara bhi, 
baaz na aayega
Tu sach mein kitna behaya hai, 
sach ye saamne aayega
 
Haaye bada sataya hai mujhe ja, 
tu bhi sataya jayega
Jana bada rulaya hai mujhe ja, 
tu bhi rulaya jayega
Tune bada sataya hai mujhe ja, 
tu bhi sataya jayega
 
Kitno ko hai maara, 
jeete ji haan tune
Khaab dikhaye pehle, 
phir khaab unhi se cheene
Tujhko to pata hai , 
hota haan khuda hai
Muh kaise dikhlayega, 
haaye bada
 
Haaye bada sataya hai mujhe ja, 
tu bhi sataya jayega
Tune bada rulaya hai mujhe ja, 
tu bhi rulaya jayega
Tune bada sataya hai mujhe ja, 
tu bhi sataya jayega
 
Jab tak jee rahi hoon ye dua karti hoon
Jab tak jee rahi hoon ye dua karti hoon
Tu har roz mare, main jis tarah marti hoon

snippet.title: Kareeb | Goldie Sohel | Siddharth Nigam | Ashi Singh | Vishal D |Kunaal V |Official Video |TM Music
snippet.description:
When a crush leads to playful flirting and ends up as love! 
This is what Kareeb is about. A fun, peppy song, composed by Goldie Sohel to Kunaal Vermaa's lyrics, sung by Vishal Dadlani, will appeal to millennials and also create nostalgia for many from older generations.

#Kareeb #SiddharthNigam #AshiSingh

----------------------------------------------------------------
Music Composed by Goldie Sohel
Written by Kunaal Vermaa
Singer - Vishal Dadlani

Music Produced and Arranged by Goldie Sohel
Sound Designer - Manash Borthakur

Guitars - Ishan Das 
Bass - Himangshu Borah 
Saxophones - I D Rao 
Backing Vocals Arranged and designed by Shreya Phukan

Vishal's Vocals recorded at YRF studios by Vijay Dayal
Vocal Design and Edit by DJ Phukan
Instruments and Backing Vocals recorded at Neo Sound by Pranjal Borah

Mixed by Pankaj Borah at Neo Sound 
Mix Assistant - Pranjal Borah

snippet.title: OFFICIAL MUSIC VIDEO | VAARI JAWAN | Rimorav Vlogs
snippet.description:
Watch VAARI JAWAN Music video by RIMORAV VLOGS Presents RI VLOGS


VAMILY finally hum sabke hoge hai 5 Million Subscribers or hum dil se thank you kehna chahta hai aap sabko for the Continuous love and Continuous Support❤️

VAMILY humne song banna shuru kiya tha 2 weeks pehle 

Singer - VAMILY yeh ganna gaya hai RI Dude aur Rukhsar Bandhukia ji ne jinhone humara Oh damn and Mere rabba Gaya hai💛 Both are AWESOME!!🤟🏻

Music - VAMILY music humare RI dudy ne banaya hai humesha ki tarah 😍

Mixing and Mastering - VAMILY Mann Taneja ji ne awesome mixing Aur mastering ki hai aur unhone ne humara Oh damn and Mere Rabba ki bhi ki thi🔥

Lyrics - Lyrics RI dudy aur Maine ( Diksha) likhe hai.. we just love writing Lyrics ✍🏻🤩

Recording - Kishan uncle ne humare Stance Studio Mein RI bhaiyan ki Recording ki hai ( Saare sur lagvaye hai matlab koshish ki hai 🤪)

Camera - RI bhaiyan ka humesha se Sapna tha ki voh FILM camera pe shoot kare toh iss leye iss bar humne Sapna pura kiya ❤️😍 Bawa ji ne camera kiya hai matlab Super se bhi upper vala!

Kapde - Mummy aur Mamu thank you so much sapne humare liye itne mast Mast kapde la kar diye! 🤗

Decoration - Muskan didi thank you aapne on the Spot jaha decoration karvana same day Mein mushkil tha aapne kar dikhaya with Ankush Jiju ki help ... you guys are LOVE 🥰

Producer - PAPA ne ganna suneke baad kaha Rishi tu jese ganna shoot karna chahta hai kar main hoon na! Love you papa for that! 🥺❤️

Director - Hum team banakar kaam karte hai VAMILY toh agar kisi ne bhi koi bhi Idea diya ho hum usse bhi Director bolte hai toh iss leye har baar ki tarah hum sab ne milakar iss Music video ko banaya hai toh sab ka yogdaan barabar hai...💕

Helping hands - ThankYou Gupta uncle & Rocky hum sab keleye khane peene ka dyaan rakhne ke leye!🤗

Safety - VAMILY humne sari safety ka dyaan rakha hai during the shoot of song! 😷

VAMILY hum FUDGE ko bhi lana chahte the music video Mein par aapko pata hai na voh kita FRIENDLY hai 😅🐶 ( Love you Fudgiiii) 

 Sanjay thank you for not sleeping during shoot 😂🤗

Or hai yeh hai gaane ke Lyrics keep sharing and keep Loving -


vekh mai be aageya saj daj ke 
Tere piche-piche paj paj ke 

loki mainu tak de menu Raj Raj ke 
Raj raj ke x3
 
Teri akhoon mein koi toh raaz hai
Lage soni jab mere sath 
Yaar menu kehnde gall baat hai
Gall baat hai x3

Oh Tera pyaar mere yaar
Dil chahe baar baar 
Bs ehna hi mai chahuga

Meri mehngi-mehngi car 
Nale paise ne hazaar 
Bs tere pe lutana chahuga

Lak tera lak tera lak matkana 
Dil kare tenu bs takde java
Haye teri haye teri gallan utte 
Dil mera kare bs vaari java x2

Main tah vaari java x3

Mai taan teri hogayi 
Haan teri hogayi
Mai taan teri ho gayi 
Soneyaa.......

Meri gallan utte 
Tu vaari jave
Haye dill diya gallan 
Tenu samajh na aave 

Tu ashique challa
Reh geya kalla
Fer vi hateda 
Mera faddan toh of palla

Tera pyaar mere yaar
Dil chave baar baar 
Bs enha hi mai chahuni aa

Teri mehngi-mehngi car 
Nale paise ne hazaar 
Eh sabh mai na chahuni aa

Lak mera lak mera lak matkana
Dil tera kare bs takde jave 
Haye meri haye meri gallan utte
Dil tera kare bs vaari java

Dil tera kare bs takde jave

Dil tera kare bs vaari java

Main tah vaari java x3

loki mainu tak de menu Raj Raj ke

Ohhhh...

Sonotek Music Presents Full Video of New Haryanvi Songs Haryanavi 2021 Hawa Baji . Another Superhit Haryanvi Song Sung By Amit Saini Rohtakiya. Starring by Amit Saini Rohtakiya, Priya Soni  Music by GR Music. Lyrics are penned by Amit Saini Rohtakiya

#AMITSAINIROHTAKIYA​ #HawaBaji​  #NewHaryanviSongs​ 
#PriyaSoni #Hawabajisong #Haryanavi2021 #Sonotek
#Haryanavi2021​ #SonotekMusic​ #AmitsainiRohtakiya​

Song Lyrics 

 R Tu Muh P Kuch Hai 
Or Piche Kuch Or Hai 
   Do Char Facklanduva Mai
  Chaale Tera Jor Hai  
Bhai Bhai Kehke Seli maar kar Gya   
Ib Saini Dhokebazi Ni ni

Rr Hero Jhal Dat Le Time Kaad Le  Rrr Makha Hawa Baji Niii

Rrr Meri Photova Ne Paad Ke kai Chode Hore hai 
Rrr Kute Apne ilakya MaiRrr Makha  Ghode Hore hai
Amit tt Tu Sidha Hoke Takra Liye Rr Par Jall Saji Nii

Rr Hero Jhal Dat Le Time Kaad Le  Rrr Makha Hawa Baji Niii

Rr badmashi Ki Speech Thodi Makha Kam Diya Kar 
Rr Makha Tadke Badama Gelya Dudh Liya Kar 
Rrr Pani K Tu Bhar K Dram Rakhe se.  
Rrr Gani Hanji Hhanji Ni 

Rr Hero Jhal Dat Le Time Kaad Le  Rrr Makha Hawa Baji Niii

रै तू मुँह पै कुछ है  रै पाछै कुछ और है 
 दो चार फकलंडुआ मै रै चालै तेरा जोर है 
  रै भाई भाई कैहके सिली मार करग्या 
 इब  सैणी धोखेबाज़ी नी 
 रै हीरो झाल डाट ले टेम काट ले 
 रै मखा हवाबाज़ी नी 
झाल डाट ले टेम काट ले 
रै बेटे हवाबाज़ी नी 
 झाल डाट ले टेम काट ले 
रै  घणी  हवाबाज़ी नी 

रै मेरी फोटुआ नै पाड़ कै कई चौड़े होरे है 
 रै कुत्ते अपणे इलाक्या मै रै मखा घोड़े होरे है 
अमित तै तू सीधा होकै टकरा लिए  
रोहतकिये  तै सीधा तू  टकरा लिए 
 पर जालसाज़ी  नी  

 रै हीरो झाल डाट ले टेम काट ले 
 रै मखा हवाबाज़ी नी 
झाल डाट ले टेम काट ले 
रै बेटे हवाबाज़ी नी 

रै बदमाशी की स्पीच थोड़ी  मखा  कम दिया कर 
रै मखा तड़कै बादमा गेल्या  दूध लिया कर 
 रै  पाणी के तू भरकै  ड्राम राखै सै  
रै मखा पाणी के तू भरकै  ड्राम राखै सै
   रै घणी हा जी हा जी नी 

रै हीरो झाल डाट ले टेम काट ले 
 रै मखा हवाबाज़ी नी 
झाल डाट ले टेम काट ले 
रै बेटे हवाबाज़ी नी

snippet.title: I made my bestfriends RE-WRITE my SONG’s LYRICS ✍🏻🎵| Tanzeel Khan
snippet.description:
Its been over a year and half , that I’ve been writing, composing and singing original songs.
So I decided to do a fun challenge with my best-friends
Where I played a quiz with them, asked them to complete my song lyrics AND ALSO RE-write them😮♥️
They did a great job!
I hope you had fun while watching this video!
Don’t forget to leave a ‘like’ if you liked this video, comment what you want me to do next and share it.

snippet.title: Coronavirus: Punjab CM announces lockdown, extends night curfew timings in the state
snippet.description:
ਕੋਰੋਨਾ ਸੰਕਟ ਨਾਲ ਨਿਪਟਣ ਲਈ ਪੰਜਾਬ ਸਰਕਾਰ ਨੇ ਵਧਾਈ ਸਖ਼ਤੀ
ਕੱਲ੍ਹ ਤੋਂ ਸੂਬੇ ‘ਚ ਸ਼ਾਮ 6:00 ਵਜੇ ਤੋਂ ਲੱਗੇਗਾ ਨਾਈਟ ਕਰਫਿਊ
ਸ਼ਾਮ 6:00 ਵਜੇ ਤੋਂ ਸਵੇਰੇ 5:00 ਵਜੇ ਤੱਕ ਜਾਰੀ ਰਹੇਗਾ ਲੌਕਡਾਊਨ
ਬਾਜ਼ਾਰ ਤੇ ਦੁਕਾਨਾਂ ਸ਼ਾਮ 6:00 ਵਜੇ ਹੋਣਗੀਆਂ ਬੰਦ 
ਸ਼ੁੱਕਰਵਾਰ ਸ਼ਾਮ 6: ਵਜੇ ਤੋਂ ਸੋਮਵਾਰ ਸਵੇਰੇ 5:00 ਵਜੇ ਤੱਕ ਰਹੇਗਾ ਵੀਕਐਂਡ ਲੌਕਡਾਊਨ
ਪੰਜਾਬ ਕੈਬਨਿਟ ਦੀ ਬੈਠਕ  ‘ਚ ਲਿਆ ਗਿਆ ਫੈਸਲਾ

Night Curfew and Shops Timing in Punjab: Amid growing concerns over the Covid situation, the Punjab Chief Minister Captain Amarinder Singh announced stricter restrictions on movement from Tuesday onwards, advancing weekday curfew by 2 hours and a strict weekend lockdown.

Read More: https://www.ptcnews.tv/coronavirus-punjab-cm-announces-lockdown-extends-night-curfew-timings-en/

#NightCurfew #Punjab  #Lockdown

snippet.title: "PM Sir, Please Make A Phone Call": Arvind Kejriwal On Oxygen Crisis
snippet.description:
Covid-19 News: Prime Minister Narendra Modi met with the Chief Minister of the 10 states worst hit by the deadly second wave of Covid on a day India touched a new record of 3.32 lakh Covid cases and 2,263 deaths in 24 hours. In an interaction that was live on TV, Delhi Chief Minister Arvind Kejriwal highlighted the crippling oxygen crisis in hospitals in the capital. "Please sir, we need your guidance," Mr Kejriwal said to the Prime Minister.

Episode 3152 : Bhide Is Taking Online Classes
---------------------------------------------------------
Bhide  is taking online class but all his students don't join the class  on time . Bhide is unhappy  with their behavior so he complains to their parents. Bhide even asks them some simply questions but they are unable to answer to know more watch the full episode.

 * ITunes - https://itunes.apple.com/us/app/liv-sports/id879341352?ls=1&mt=8

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises.

snippet.title: MUTTON SCRAMBLED EGG | Biggest Scrambled Egg Cooking with Mutton Keema Meat | Lamb mixed Egg Recipe
snippet.description:
Today in our village we cook Scrambled Egg Omelette Recipe by adding boneless mutton meat with egg. We use the big vessel to make this biggest scrambled egg. We also use hand ground masalas to make this egg recipe yummy.

Finally, we eat these eggs with our favorite mutton recipe.

snippet.description:
KHASA AALA CHAHAR : FOOLAD (Official Video) | Ghanu Music | New Haryanvi Songs Haryanavi 2021

FOOLAD (Official Video) Song sung by "Khasa Aala Chahar" in the praise of the best e-learning platform, Dhurina. Now, you can prepare for your upcoming competitive exams with Interactive Live lectures, Pdf notes, test series, and other study material by the best educators of the country at the most reasonable prices. 

To download the app:
https://dhurina.app.link/9friYpORDfb

Happy Learning:)

In this song music given by Ghanu Music. Label by Royal Music Factory. For More Haryanavi Songs Subscribe to Our Channel.

#Foolad #KhasaAalaChahar #RoyalMusicFactory #NewHaryanviSongHaryanavi2021

Song: Foolad फौलाद (Full Song)
Starring : Khasa Aala Chahar
Singer/Lyrics/Composer : Khasa Aala Chahar 
Follow On : https://instagram.com/khasa_aala_chahar

Music : Ghanu Music
Director : Sanju Sehrawat
Mix Master : D chandu
Dop : Satish 
Editor : Bhagirath Sharma

Special Thanks : Khaas Group (Mukesh, Sidharth, Pardeep, Rohit, Sumit)

https://www.instagram.com/navibaadliwal

CEO: Jyoti Mishra
Music Label: Royal Music Factory

Enquiry Contacts of Royal Music Factory
Call on +91-9717764821

Lyrics -
Time kahan te na aave laana pdega
Yo mehnat ka ghadiya bjana pdega
Tne khud ne se bera chuha se ya sher
Tne dunia ti krke dikhana pdega

Tne mehnat te bhaag jgaana pdega
Re tu khud k swal ka jvaab h
Re utth jaag tu foolad ki olaad h 
utth jaag tu foolad ki olaad h
Utth jaag tu foolad ki olaad h 

Garib ghar me tu jaama tera koi dosh na 
Marga grib dosh laag jaavega
Kalla ghar te likad kuchh kar de unique 
Teri gel me jamaana saara laag jaavega 
Bina tili khasa aale aag laa jaavega 
Met de jo utthe saali khaaj h 
Utth jaag tu foolad ki olaad h
Utth jaag tu foolad ki olaad h
Utth jaag tu foolad ki olaad h
Utth jaag tu foolad ki olaad h

Foolad ki olaad h ( 7 ) 

Dekhe sapne je tne jor tuhe laavega
Ya tu dekh k halat khali betth jaavega
Re ya dunia samnder iski tu machhli jor de na koi or khaa jaavega
Raakh khud pe yakin daav laa jaavega
Baad iske ya jindagi aabad h 
Utth jaag tu foolad h 
Utth jaag tu foolad ki olaad h 
Utth jaag tu foolad ki olaad h
Utth jaag tu foolad ki olaad h

Hole takda tu chot maari jaavegi 
Tera hatt ga je dyaan baaji haari jaavegi 
Dosh time ne na deve
Game changer se tu
Re ya na palat k na baari aavegi
Ho tere faisle karan ki bhi baari aavegi
Liye badle jo jo tere yaad h
Utth jaag tu foolad ki olaad h
Utth jaag tu foolad ki olaad h
Utth jaag tu foolad ki olaad h
Utth jaag tu foolad ki olaad h

snippet.title: TVF's Aspirants | Web Series | Episode 3 | Positive Approach Rakh Yaar
snippet.description:
Like the Episode? Rate us on IMDb - https://www.imdb.com/title/tt14392248/

The next Episode Releases on 28th April, when we reach 9M Subscribers.

Preparing for UPSC is challenging. It tests not only your knowledge but also your patience. It’s really important to maintain a positive approach throughout your preparation. But everyone around Abhilash notices that he lacks a positive approach in his personality, which reflects in his answers too. How will Abhilash cope with it? Will he be able to keep his approach positive?

Participate in the Unacademy Combat, a weekly scholarship test for UPSC SCE. Use code ASPIRANTS2021 to take the test and compete with peers across the country. Top rankers will also stand a chance to get up to 100% scholarship from a pool worth Rs 1 Crore.
Link - https://unacademy.com/combat/a/KSCGY

This examination season, we bring you the story of three friends who reunite to tell us all about UPSC Pre... Mains... Aur Life. 

Unacademy & The Viral Fever presents ASPIRANTS - A TVF Original Series. 

Credits:
Created by: Arunabh Kumar & Shreyansh Pandey
Directed by: Apoorv Singh Karki 
Written by: Deepesh Sumitra Jagdish 
Produced by: Arunabh Kumar 
Executive Producers: Vijay Koshy, Shreyansh Pandey, Arun Kumar 
Supervising Producers: Haider Ali, Joshna Bhat 
Associate Director: Himali Shah 
D.O.P: Georgy John, Arjun Kukreti 
Editor: Tushar Manocha 
Background Score: Tusshar Mallek 
Music: Rohit Sharma
Head of Post Production: Gaurav Rungta 
Casting: Ashish Khare & Shiv Chauhan 
Production Designer: Beeva Mahajan 
Costume Stylist: Yashika Kakkar 
Sound Design: Pranit Purao (Acoustry Private Limited)
DI Colorist: David Gabris (Futureworks Media Limited)
Head of Finance: Manish Saini

Cast: Naveen Kasturia, Shivankit Parihar, Abhilash Thapliyal, Sunny Hinduja, Namita Dubey

UPSC fact #87: 23.72% of the total UPSC Aspirants wanted to become IAS officers because they wanted to be called “Babu” so that finally someone will ask them “Mele Babu ne thana thaya?”
-The Description Guy.

#TVFAspirants​ #TVFOriginal​ #LetsCrackIt​ #UPSC​ 

This Channel is owned, operated, and managed by Contagious Online Media Network Private Limited.

snippet.title: Ek Bhutiya Train Ki Sacchi Kahani - Paranormal Story of A Train (Zanetti Train)- AMF Ep 63
snippet.description:
Zanetti train story is a popular Italian urban legend. The story is fascinating. The story tells that  the train left Rome and went through the mountain tunnel in Lombard but it disappeared with the passengers inside the tunnel. It is one of the best paranormal stories.

Let us explore the story in this episode of AMF (Amazing Micro Facts) series.

AMF (Amazing Micro Facts) is a mini knowledge series by Rajesh Kumar AKA FactTechz where we explore various amazing facts related to our amazing world. Know how enigmatic and astonishing our world is! This is the episode 63 of AMF.

Enjoy the show!

Follow FactTechz On:

Instagram: https://instagram.com/facttechz
Twitter: https://twitter.com/facttechz
Facebook: https://facebook.com/facttechz

Click here to Subscribe to Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah Official Channel: https://www.youtube.com/taarakmehtakaooltahchashmah?sub_confirmation=1 

Click here to watch all your favorite Episode videos: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gqFEadNxmd8&list=PLPbh-P_C0BzRYOkpGxKL-6QmvYSL_ZuCu 

We bring to you the best videos from your favorite show Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah. So, get your daily dose of laughter with Jethalal, Taarak Mehta, Daya, Champaklal and their neighbors in Gokuldham Society.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
--------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired from the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story revolves around daily happenings in "Gokuldham Co-operative Society" and covers topical issues which are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Shailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi / Raj Anadkat). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalal.

Cast:
---------
Dilip Joshi as Jethalal Champaklal Gada
Disha Vakani as Daya Jethalal Gada
Raj Anadkat / Bhavya Gandhi as Tipendra Jethalal Gada (Tapu) 
Amit Bhatt as Champaklal Jayantilal Gada
Shailesh Lodha as Taarak Mehta
Neha Mehta as Anjali Taarak Mehta
Tanuj Mahashabde as Krishnan Subramaniam Iyer
Munmun Dutta as Babita Krishnan Iyer
Mandar Chandwadkar as Aatmaram Tukaram Bhide
Sonalika Joshi as Madhvi Aatmaram Bhide
Nidhi Bhanushali / Palak Sidhwani as Sonalika Aatmaram Bhide (Sonu) 
Gurucharan Singh/ Balwinder suri as Roshan Singh Harjeet Singh Sodhi
Jennifer Mistry Bansiwal as Roshan Kaur Roshan Singh Sodhi
Kavi Kumar Azad / Nirmal Soni as Dr. Hansraj Hathi 
Ambika Ranjankar as Komal Hansraj Hathi
Kush Shah as Gulabkumar Hansraj Hathi (Goli)
Shyam Pathak as Popatlal Pandey
Sharad Sankla as Abdul
Azhar Shaikh as Pinku 

Produced By: Neela Asit Modi, Asit Kumarr Modi 
Special Thanks: Mahesh Vakil, Indu Tarak Mehta
Set Design: Jayant Deshmukh
On-Air Promotion  ( SAB): SAB OAP
Costume Designer: Alka Mehta
Costume Stylist: Ekta Brahmbhatt
Sound Recordist: Shakeel Mansuri 
Cameraman: Aamir Virani
Production Head: Arvind Marchande
Production Controler: Vinod Shishupal
Background Music: Sunil Patni
Online Editors: Vishal Tambe, Sandeep Singh 
Executive Producer: Jatin Yogesh Bajaj
Editor: Dinesh Gosavi, Kaushal Mistry, Devang Modi, Vinod Maurya
Creative Supervision: Krunal Khakhkhar
Operation Head: Sohil Ramani
Written By: Raju Odedra & Rajen Upadhyay
Directors: Harshad Joshi, Malav Suresh Rajda

Television Adaptation and Designed By: Asit Kumarr Modi

These 6 products are extensively marketed as essentials and are a part of daily life of almost every woman today. We will discuss why they are so damaging and how to switch to healthier alternatives which too are available and affordable.

mr.title: झूम - भाग ३ | भीड तू (एफ२एफ) | मराठी वेबसिरीज | #bhadipa
mr.description:
गौरव आणि त्याचे मित्र निसटले आहेत गंगाधरच्या तावडीतून पण परत आल्यावर कोणता गोंधळ करणार त्यांचं स्वागत? गंगाधर त्यांना सोडून देणार का आता हे प्रकरण जाणार एक पाऊल पुढे? जाणून घेण्यासाठी हा भाग शेवटपर्यंत पाहा! 
झूम ही आमची एक नवीन वेब सिरीज आहे. मित्र, कुटुंब, आणि गडबड-गोंधळ ह्या सर्वांनी भरपूर असा हा अनुभव नक्की घ्या. घेऊन येत आहोत एक नवीन भाग  प्रत्येक रविवारी. म्हणूनच #भाडिपा ला सबस्क्राईब करा. 

श्रेयावली- 

कलाकार-
आई - विभावरी देशपांडे
बाबा - सुनील अभ्यंकर
छोटा गौरव - अर्णव कल्कुंद्री
ईशा - तृष्णा चंद्रात्रे
गौरव - गंधर्व गुळवेलकर
गणेश - दिव्य खरनारे
मुकुंद - केतन विसल
गंगाधर - गणेश माने
कुलकर्णी काका - धनंजय सरदेशपांडे
सावंत आजी - हेमा राघू
मिसेस कारखानीस - संपदा देवधर
धुमाळ - अमित कोडे
बायको वी.ओ. - सविता प्रभुणे

दिग्दर्शन - ओमकार जाधव, अभय राऊत
निर्माते - सारंग साठये,पॉला मॅग्लेन, अनुषा नंदकुमार
नाटक आणि कथा - वरुण नार्वेकर
पटकथा - सई हवल, प्राची हंकारे
संवाद - वरुण नार्वेकर, सई हवल, प्राची हंकारे
एक्झिक्युटिव्ह प्रोड्युसर - प्राजक्ता सालबर्डे
छायाचित्रण संचालक - चैतन्य पुराणिक
संकलन - अनुजा भंडारे
सोऊंड डिझाईन, सिंक साऊंड आणि मिक्स - सौरभ मोरगावकर, झमीर तांबोळी  
रंगभूषा आणि वेशभूषा - आशिष हेमंत देशपांडे
संगीत दिग्दर्शन - ए. व्ही. प्रफुल्लाचंद्र
कला दिग्दर्शन - मयूर पवार, अक्षय आंबेडकर
कलरिस्ट: कुणाल तिवारी
ब्रँड आणि सेल्स हेड - स्वानंद तेंडुलकर
पहिला सहाय्यक दिग्दर्शक - राजीब रावल
सहाय्यक दिग्दर्शक - अभिप्राय कामठे, पृथ्वीराज चव्हाण
लाईन प्रोड्युसर - तेजस लिमये
प्रोडक्शन असिस्टंट - रोहन खरे
पहिला एसी आणि फोकस पुलर - बडे कृष्णा
कास्टिंग - ओमकार जाधव, अभय राऊत
लोगो डिझाईन टायटल ऍनिमेशन आणि वी.एफ.एक्स. - इंविमोल्ड पिक्चर्स
वेशभूषा सहाय्यक - हर्षदा आंबेडकर
रंगभूषा सहाय्यक - उमेश जाधव
क्रिएटिव्हस् - प्राजक्ता नेवाळकर
फायनान्स आणि अकाऊंटस्- आदित्य देसाई
बी. टी. एस. - ओमकार कुडाळे
टीम सॅनीटायझेशन - पार्थसारथी वडगावकर
वी.एफ.एक्स. टीम - प्रतीक उमाळे, जयराज वारती
स्पॉट - संतोष मांपेडी, प्रवीण तरी
केटरिंग - हॉटेल ग्रीन सिग्नल, पुणे
लोकेशन - शिवनगरी सोसायटी, पुणे
लोकेशन करटसी - पराग आणि सुप्रिया वडगावकर
उपशीर्षक - प्राची हंकारे
ट्रान्सपोर्ट - सागर राऊत, स्वप्नील भोसले
कॅमेरा वेंडर - अकॉर्ड एक्विप, पुणे
कॅमेरा अटेंडेंट - नागेश शिंदे, जितेंद्र सिंग
लाईट वेंडर - आयडीयल सिने इक्विपमेंट्स
लायटिंग टीम - बंटी साळुंखे, पप्पू साळुंखे, महादेव शिंदे, योगेश वानरे, दीपक राजपूत
प्रॉप मॅन - नितीन आर्ट्स, उमेश मुळे
ग्राफिक डिझाइन - व्हिजन ग्राफिक्स
कला टीम - रशमिकांत सलावी, अंकुश मालेकर, महेश कुऱ्हाडे, सचिन चासकर, अमोल कानडे, राजकुमार शर्मा, रामहारक विश्वकर्मा
सोशल मीडिया टीम - अनिकेत जाधव, पूजा परब, तन्वी कुलकर्णी, रीचा जावळेकर

snippet.description:
Enter here: https://gleam.io/YPfBy/tg-mi-11-ultra-giveaway
Namaskaar Dosto, is video mein maine aapse baat ki hai Xiaomi Mi 11 Ultra 5G Smartphone ke baare mein aur share ki hai kuch details isi Mi 11 Ultra Smartphone ke baare mein aur saath hi isi Mi 11 Ultra ki ek Unboxing aur details share ki hai. Mi 11 Ultra ek flagship phone hai Xiaomi ki taraf se jaha hai 6.81" ka WQHD+ AMOLED 120Hz Display, Mi 11 Ultra 5G mein hai ek Triple Camera setup 50MP Primary Camera + 48MP Ultrawide Camera + 48MP 5x Zoom (120x Zoom) Camera ke saath mein. Mi 11 Ultra 5G mein hai 20MP Selfie Camera aur power ke liye hai liquid cooled Qualcomm Snapdragon 888 5G Processor, aur saath mein 8GB/12GB RAM LPDDR5 RAM aur 256GB/512GB UFS3.1 Storage aur saath mein 5000mAh ki Battery 67W wired/wireless charging ke saath mein jaha 10W reverse wireless charging bhi available hai. Xiaomi Mi 11 Ultra 5G Smartphone mein hamare paas hai WiFi 6E, 5G multilink aur NFC option bhi available hai. Xiaomi Mi 11 Ultra phone aap mein se kisi ek lucky viewer ko milne waala hai. Mujhe umeed hai ki aapko Mi 11 Ultra 5G ki yeh unboxing video pasand aayegi.

'Swaragini' is a story about Swara and Ragini, who belong to warring families, but later realise that they are in fact half-sisters. Out of sheer hatred, Ragini manipulates Swara's love interest, Lakshaya into marriage, while Swara ends up getting married to Lakshya's brother, Sanskar. Once he learns the truth, Sanskar swears to reunite Swara with Lakshya, but in turn falls in love with her. Will Swara choose her lover over her husband, or will the sanctity of holy matrimony triumph?

snippet.title: Tapu Ki Nayi Maa?! | Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah | TMKOC Comedy | तारक मेहता का उल्टा चश्मा
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah Official Channel: https://www.youtube.com/taarakmehtakaooltahchashmah?sub_confirmation=1 

Click here to watch all your favorite Episode videos: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gqFEadNxmd8&list=PLPbh-P_C0BzRYOkpGxKL-6QmvYSL_ZuCu 

We bring to you the best videos from your favorite show Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah. So, get your daily dose of laughter with Jethalal, Taarak Mehta, Daya, Champaklal and their neighbors in Gokuldham Society.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
--------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired from the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story revolves around daily happenings in "Gokuldham Co-operative Society" and covers topical issues which are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Shailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi / Raj Anadkat). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalal.

Cast:
---------
Dilip Joshi as Jethalal Champaklal Gada
Disha Vakani as Daya Jethalal Gada
Raj Anadkat / Bhavya Gandhi as Tipendra Jethalal Gada (Tapu) 
Amit Bhatt as Champaklal Jayantilal Gada
Shailesh Lodha as Taarak Mehta
Neha Mehta as Anjali Taarak Mehta
Tanuj Mahashabde as Krishnan Subramaniam Iyer
Munmun Dutta as Babita Krishnan Iyer
Mandar Chandwadkar as Aatmaram Tukaram Bhide
Sonalika Joshi as Madhvi Aatmaram Bhide
Nidhi Bhanushali / Palak Sidhwani as Sonalika Aatmaram Bhide (Sonu) 
Gurucharan Singh/ Balwinder suri as Roshan Singh Harjeet Singh Sodhi
Jennifer Mistry Bansiwal as Roshan Kaur Roshan Singh Sodhi
Kavi Kumar Azad / Nirmal Soni as Dr. Hansraj Hathi 
Ambika Ranjankar as Komal Hansraj Hathi
Kush Shah as Gulabkumar Hansraj Hathi (Goli)
Shyam Pathak as Popatlal Pandey
Sharad Sankla as Abdul
Azhar Shaikh as Pinku 

Produced By: Neela Asit Modi, Asit Kumarr Modi 
Special Thanks: Mahesh Vakil, Indu Tarak Mehta
Set Design: Jayant Deshmukh

snippet.title: Wah Ji Waah - (Official Video) Gurnazar | Amyra Dastur - New Hindi Song 2021 - Latest Songs 2021
snippet.description:
Jjust music presents Wah Ji Waah. Feel the beautiful pain of a heartbreak in the soulful voice of Gurnazar featuring gorgeous Amyra Dastur. Be mesmerized by the chemistry of this amazing duo along with a powerful choreography and direction by Mudassar Khan.

►👉Subscribe to Jjust Music: www.youtube.com/c/JjustMusic​

Official Short Video App Partner: MX Takatak

🎵Audio Credits-

►Singer - Gurnazar
►Singer / Lyrics / Composer - Gurnazar
►Music - Kartik Dev and Gaurav Dev
►Guitars - Somya Seal
►Percussions - Rishabh Shankar
►Mix & Master - Eric Pillai

🎥Video Credits:

►Director and Choreographer : Mudassar Khan 
►Featuring: Gurnazar and Amyra Dastur
►Supporting actor/ Model : Rajat
►Cinematography: Sukha Kamboj
►Art : Pinky
►Line Production : Neeraj
►MudassarKhanTeam :
1) Alias Kader
2) Govind Kotap
3) Abhishri sen
4) Aman Subhash Naidu
5) Darshan Mandaliya
6) Praveen Acharya 
7) Sunil Verma

►DI - Onkar Singh

►EP- Nilay Pandey
►Additional Costume Stylist - Deepshikha Talvar
►On set Still Photography: Shivangi Kulkarni

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Lyrics:

Dil Behla Kar Ji Mooh Modne ka
Dil Behla Kar Ji Mooh Modne ka
Wah ji waah Kya Hunar Hai Dil Todne Ka
Wah ji waah Kya Hunar Hai Dil Todne Ka
Kamal Hai Kamal Hai Tumhari Bhi Kamal Hai
Kal Hor Koi Naal Si Aj Hor Koi Naal Hai,
Kamal Hai Kamal Hai Tumhari Bhi Kamal Hai
Kal Hor Koi Naal Si Aj Hor Koi Naal Hai,
Choron Ki Tarah Chori Karke Daudne Ka,
Wah ji waah Kya Hunar Hai Dil Todne Ka
Wah ji waah Kya Hunar Hai Dil Todne Ka...

Bhoolna Tumhare Liye Aam Baat Hogi,
Tumko Humari Baatein Kahan Yaad Hongi,
Bhoolna Tumhare Liye Aam Baat Hogi,
Tumko Humari Baatein Kahan Yaad Hongi,
Naye Naye Chehron Se Roz Naate Jodne Ka,
Wah ji waah Kya Hunar Hai Dil Todne Ka
Wah ji waah Kya Hunar Hai Dil Todne Ka...


Nazar Ji Nazar Ji Kiya Karo Kadar ji
Tez Tez Chalte Ho Rakha Karo Sabar Ji,
Nazar Ji Nazar Ji Kiya Karo Kadar ji
Tez Tez Chalte Ho Rakha Karo Sabar Ji,
Istemal Karke Log Peeche Chorne Ka,
Wah ji waah Kya Hunar Hai Dil Todne Ka
Wah ji waah Kya Hunar Hai Dil Todne Ka

snippet.title: സന്തോഷ് ജോർജ് കുളങ്ങരയുടെ പൈതൃക കേന്ദ്രത്തിൽ 125 - 250 വർഷം പഴക്കമുള്ള കെട്ടിടങ്ങൾ പുനഃസ്ഥാപിച്ച കഥ
snippet.description:
കേരളത്തിന്റെ വിവിധ ഭാഗങ്ങളിൽ നിന്ന് വാങ്ങിയ, 125 മുതൽ 250 വർഷം വരെ പഴക്കമുള്ള വീടുകളും എട്ടുകെട്ടുകളും വൈക്കത്തിനടുത്ത് ഒരു ദ്വീപിൽ സന്തോഷ് കുളങ്ങര പുനഃസ്ഥാപിച്ച കഥ കേൾക്കുക.. A Story of Kerala Palace 
Part 1: https://youtu.be/6h8M2_HZ8uw

Follow me on Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/baijunnairofficial
Instagram: www.instagram.com/baijunnair
Email:baijunnair@gmail.com   

വാർത്തകൾക്കും ടെസ്റ്റ് ഡ്രൈവ് റിപ്പോർട്ടുകൾക്കുമായി ഞങ്ങളുടെ വെബ്‌സൈറ്റ് സന്ദർശിക്കാം: http://www.smartdrivemag.com

snippet.description:

►Subscribe to The Weeknd on YouTube: http://theweeknd.co/subscribeYD 
►Get exclusive merch: shop.theweeknd.com

Production Company: Blinkink @blink_ink
Director: Jack Brown - @jbanimation
Executive Producer: Josef Byrne @philipphlop 
Producers: Matt Marsh, Dom Thompson-Talbot & Sami Goddard
Storyboard Artist: Sav Akyüz @splitwigs

Design:
Pete Sharp @petesharp.universe
Dexter Maurer @dextermaurer
James Neilson @jamesxneilson

Character Design: Jack Brown - @jbanimation

Animation:
Anita Gill @_anitagill
Andrew Khosravani @andrew_khosravani
Ed Smith @boxbeatrobot
Katherine Spangenberg @katiediazz.art
Gaurav Wakankar @gwakankar
Maki Yoshikura @maki_animation
Michael Towers @michael.towers
Nikunj Patel @spiralofsorts
Thomas Knowler @knowlerdraws

Compositors:
Jonathan Gallagher @grasptheview
Paul Cheshire @paul_cheshire
Adriano Vessichelli @adrianovessichelli

Editor: David Toba @ediztor

Lyrics:
THE WEEKND
I saw you dancing in a crowded room
You look so happy when I’m not with you
But then you saw me caught you by surprise
A single teardrop falling from your eyes
I don’t know why I run away
I make you cry when I run away
You could’ve asked my why I broke your heart
You could’ve told me that you fell apart
But you walked past me like I wasn’t there
And just pretended like you didn’t care
I don’t know why I run away
I make you cry when I run away
Take me back cause I wanna stay
Save your tears for another…
Save your tears for another day
Save your tears for another day
ARIANA GRANDE
Met you once under a Pisces moon
I kept my distance ‘cause I know that you
Don’t like when I’m with nobody else
I couldn’t help it, I put you through hell
I don’t know why I run away, oh boy
I make you cry when I run away
Boy take me back ‘cause I wanna stay
Save your tears for another
I realize that it’s much too late
And you deserve someone better
THE WEEKND & ARIANA GRANDE
Save your tears for another day
Save your tears for another day
I don’t know why, I run away
I make you cry when I run away
Save your tears for another day
Save your tears for another day
Save your tears for another day
Save your tears for another day
Save your tears for another day
Save your tears for another day

#TheWeeknd #ArianaGrande #SaveYourTearsRemix

How To Beat Your Addiction?
How To Quit Any Addiction?
नमस्ते दोस्तों!
The Ranveer Show हिंदी के 31st Episode में आप सभी का स्वागत है। आज के Podcast में हम बात करेंगे Addictions की। हम सभी जानते हैं कि कोई भी चीज़ Limit में लो तो Medicine और Addiction की तरह लो तो Poison बन जाती है। आज के समय में 46% से भी ज़्यादा भारतीय अलग-अलग तरह के Substance Abuse का शिकार हैं और 80% से भी ज़्यादा लोगों के Suicide करने का Reason होता है Substance Abuse. ऐसे में क्या Substance Abuse Safe है? क्या लोगों को Alcohol, Drugs, जैसी चीज़ों का इस्तेमाल करना चाहिए?
एक समय की बात है जब मैं भी Substance Abuse का शिकार हो चुका था। 
जानिए कैसे अलग-अलग Addictions ने मेरे Career, Relationships, Exams, Business और Creativity पर असर किया और कैसे मैं एक Addict से Teetotaller बना। 
ऐसे में कैसे मैंने इनका सामना किया और अपने Addictions को Overcome करके अपने Motivation को Restore किया जानने के लिए इस खास Addiction Motivation Podcast को आखिर तक ज़रूर देखें सिर्फ और सिर्फ आपके Favourite BeerBiceps Hindi Channel Ranveer Allahbadia पर।

#addiction #alcohol

https://www.instagram.com/ranveerallahbadia/

---------------------------------------------

About :

Ranveer Allahbadia एक Self Improvement और Self Help Channel है।
हमने Channel की शुरुआत Fitness और Health Videos से की थी।
फिर धीरे-धीरे हमने Fashion, Grooming, Personal Finance, Etiquette, Meditation, Mental Health, Communication Skills और Entrepreneurship जैसे Topics पर भी ढ़ेर सारे Videos बनाए।

आज Ranveer Allahbadia Channel पर नए भारत का नया Podcast The Ranveer Show हिंदी या TRS हिंदी भी Available है।
एक ऐसा Show जहाँ हम आपके साथ Share करते हैं ढ़ेर सारे Success Stories और हर Success के पीछे छुपे Success Secrets. 
#TheRanveerShow का हर Conversation होता है Intellectual, Deep और Informational.
Entrepreneurs हो या Bollywood Stars से लेकर Athletes तक हर कोई हमारे Podcast का हिस्सा रह चुका है। हमारे Podcast का हर एक Conversation आपको देगा Extreme Learning Experience.

अपने पसंद के Videos को देखने के लिए हमारे Home Page पर दिए गए Playlist को ज़रूर Check करें।

snippet.description:
KHASA AALA CHAHAR : LOOT LIYA (Lyrical) New Haryanvi Songs Haryanavi 2021 | Yaar Tera Full Papi Hai

Nav Haryanvi Presenting "Loot Liya (Lyrical Video)" a New Haryanvi Songs Haryanavi 2021. Sung by Khasa Aala Chahar. Starring with Khasa Aala Chahar and Sweta Chauhan. Music Given by Ghanu Music. Penned by Khasa Aala Chahar. This Video Directed by Ameet Choudhary. Music Label by Nupur Audio.

#LootLiya #YaarTeraFullPapiHai #KhasaAalaChahar #SwetaChauhan #AmeetChoudhary #NewHaryanviSongsHaryanavi2021

Lyrics -
Jab dekhya pehli baar tere te pyar tere te ho gaya re,
Yo toot na jave sapna sa yo soch ferrer te te so gaya re,
Main khud sapne mein kho gaya re mane bera na ke ho gaya re,
Location teri bhardi oye aur tere pyar ka root liya,

Oye Loot liya re loot liya oye din dhole tane loot liya,
Oye tu chambal ki daaku se tane din dhole main loot liya, Loot liya loot liya,

O kit re tu aayi hai aur kit si tane jaana se,
Debate chalegi tere pe ib shuru kiya se gaana se,
Abhiyaan search tera jaari hai tane galti kardi bhaari se,
Ib chaapa padna tere pe kara Janhit bheta jari se,
Oye haani karak zehar tera aur galti te maine ghoot liya,

Oye Loot liya re loot liya oye din dhole tane loot liya,
Oye tu chambal ki daaku se tane din dhole main loot liya, Loot liya loot liya,

Tu paue jitni dikikhan mein or bottle barga asar tera,
Re samajh kise ke aaya na isa kar diya se yo hashar mera,
Nu aage pache bohot ghani par dil tere pe aaya se,
Akhand taareef ki patar tu jab geet tere pe gaya hai,
Baaki to sab moh-maya se aur sabka bhanda foot liya,

Oye Loot liya re loot liya oye din dhole tane loot liya,
Oye tu chambal ki daaku se tane din dhole main loot liya, Loot liya loot liya, 

Oye yaar tera full paapi hai na duji koi copy se,
Mai ek ekla antique su ya news aa ne bhi chaapi hai,
Re Dil te Dhanyawad karu meri zindagi mein jo aayi tu,
Ya saare raaji ho jange banja inki bharjayi tu,
Chal chhod jeans or top tera ja Mere naam ka suit liya,

Oye Loot liya re loot liya oye din dhole tane loot liya,
Oye tu chambal ki daaku se tane din dhole main loot liya, Loot liya loot liya.

ओय लूट लिया र लूट लिया ओय दिन धोले तने लूट लिया ओय तू चंबल की डाकू से तने दिल धोले मै लूट लिया

Watch the Promo of the Popular Malayalam Show #SwanthamSujatha that airs on Surya TV.
 
Watch this serial exclusively on Surya TV.
Tune in at 9:00 PM (Mon to Fri)
Repeat Telecast at 8:00 AM and 1:30 PM (Mon to Fri)
 
 #SwanthamSujatha #SwanthamSujathaPromo #SuryaTV
 
 Swantham Sujatha revolves around Sujatha, a happy home maker, who loves her family and cherishes her life. But her life turns into a roller coaster ride, when she finds her true calling as an RJ after being home bound for years. Follow Sujatha's story of self awakening , even as she deals with life's challenges and finds a way around them.

snippet.title: Thee Veeran | Hiphop Tamizha Documentary
snippet.description:
Narrated by Hiphop Tamizha, this documentary sheds light upon the life of Tamil Nadu Fire Fighters of India. This voyage has changed our perspective on life. At dire times like this, amidst the pandemic, we wish this effort of ours will sow seeds of hope upon the barren souls who are feeling downcast. There is always hope if we know where to look for. In our case, we found that in our year-long journey filled with Passion, Bravery and Sacrifice. Witness the journey unfold.

Writer-Director - Hiphop Tamizha
Music Producer by  HiphopTamizha
Executive Producer - Ashwanth
Singer - Nivas 
Background Score Programming - Fazil sha
Sound Engineer - Nikhil Mathews
DOP - Arjun Raja D.F.Tech
DOP Assistant - Dani Pops
Editor - Deepak.S.Dwaraknath
Colorist - Siva
Design - Nxtgen Studio
Promo Cut - Krishna
Social Media Manager - SriramSurathKumar
Hiphop Tamizha Staff - Parthiban, Nishanth 

In association with Tamil Nadu Fire Rescue & Services 

A Tamizhanda Movement Initiative.

snippet.title: क्या सब जान जाएंगे Sundar के इस Avatar का Raaz? | तारक मेहता का उल्टा चश्मा | Anokhe Avatar
snippet.description:
Click here to subscribe to SAB TV Channel: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC6-F5tO8uklgE9Zy8IvbdFw?sub_confirmation=1

Watch Anokhe Avatar clips of your favorite show Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL6Rtnh6YJK7bazgTn3zyRg2wlOBQ0GVfQ

Watch these special Avatars of your favorite characters from Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah!

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah: 
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in "Gokuldham Co-operative Society" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble for all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalaal.
tags: taarak mehta ka ooltah chashmah daya and jetha comedy
tarak mehta daya and jetha romance

snippet.title: THE CONJURING: THE DEVIL MADE ME DO IT – Official Trailer
snippet.description:
True horror returns. Based on the case files of Ed and Lorraine Warren. #TheConjuring: The Devil Made Me Do It, in theaters and HBO Max June 4.
 
https://www.facebook.com/TheConjuringMovie
https://twitter.com/TheConjuring
https://www.instagram.com/theconjuring
https://www.theconjuringmovie.com
 
“The Conjuring: The Devil Made Me Do It” reveals a chilling story of terror, murder and unknown evil that shocked even experienced real-life paranormal investigators Ed and Lorraine Warren. One of the most sensational cases from their files, it starts with a fight for the soul of a young boy, then takes them beyond anything they’d ever seen before, to mark the first time in U.S. history that a murder suspect would claim demonic possession as a defense.
 
Vera Farmiga and Patrick Wilson return to star as Lorraine and Ed Warren, under the direction of Michael Chaves (“The Curse of La Llorona”). The film also stars Ruairi O’Connor (Starz’ “The Spanish Princess”), Sarah Catherine Hook (Hulu’s “Monsterland”) and Julian Hilliard (the series “Penny Dreadful: city of Angels” and “The Haunting of Hill House”).
 
“The Conjuring: The Devil Made Me Do It” was produced by James Wan and Peter Safran, who have collaborated on all the “Conjuring” Universe films. Chaves directed from a screenplay by David Leslie Johnson-McGoldrick (“The Conjuring 2,” “Aquaman”), story by James Wan & David Leslie Johnson-McGoldrick, based on characters created by Chad Hayes & Carey W. Hayes. Serving as executive producers were Richard Brener, Dave Neustadter, Victoria Palmeri, Michael Clear, Judson Scott and Michelle Morrissey.
 
The behind-the-scenes creative team reunited “Conjuring” Universe contributors, including director of photography Michael Burgess, production designer Jennifer Spence, costume designer Leah Butler and composer Joseph Bishara, along with the director’s editor from “The Curse of La Llorona,” Peter Gvozdas, and editor Christian Wagner (“Furious 7”).
 
“The Conjuring: The Devil Made Me Do It” is the seventh film in the “Conjuring” Universe, the largest horror franchise in history, which has grossed more than $1.8 billion worldwide. It includes the first two “Conjuring” films, as well as “Annabelle” and “Annabelle: Creation,” “The Nun,” and “Annabelle Comes Home.”
 
New Line Cinema presents An Atomic Monster/A Peter Safran Production, “The Conjuring: The Devil Made Me Do It.” It will be distributed by Warner Bros. Pictures. The film opens in theatres and IMAX nationwide on June 4, 2021 and will be available on HBO Max for 31 days from theatrical release. The film is rated R for terror, violence and some disturbing images.

snippet.title: India 'shaken by Covid storm' - BBC News
snippet.description:
India has registered a new world record for daily coronavirus infections for the fourth day in a row. 

Almost 350,000 new cases and more than 2,700 deaths were reported in the past 24 hours. 

The Indian capital Delhi has extended its lockdown for another week as Prime Minister Narendra Modi said the country had been shaken by a "storm" and urged people to get vaccinated.

snippet.title: Shakti | शक्ति | Episode 1228 | Coming Up Next
snippet.description:
In a shocking turn of events, Harman confesses the truth and reveals his true identity in front of his family. Watch the sneak peek of the upcoming episode.
#ColorsTV #Shakti

To subscribe this channel go to: http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=colorstv

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ColorsTV
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colorstv/

Set against the backdrop of culturally rich and vibrant Punjab, Shakti-Astitva Ke Ehsaas Ki portrays the power of a family to dictate the fate of its daughters, Soumya and Surbhi. Deprived of an education, companions and toys, Soumya can't understand the indifference her father and Dadi show towards her and finds solace only in her mother's arms. Meanwhile Surbhi gets everything she wants, except for the one thing she yearns for-her mother's love. What has caused these heart-breaking rifts in this otherwise perfect family? What makes parents discriminate between their own daughters? Watch the mystery unfold.
